trend.note: CLEAR PATTERN: Handwritten/scheduled tweets (mar19-22 batch) are CLEAN. Automated agent output (trend posts, brain insights, counter posts, compound posts) has systemic quality issues: cookie-cutter endings, truncated output, duplicate templates, math errors. The quality gap is between HUMAN-REVIEWED PIPELINE (clean) and AUTOMATED PIPELINE (degrading). Root cause: agent prompt templates need quality constraints baked in. DEPLOYMENT remains the #1 revenue blocker.
